headlines.headline: Plevum Partners names new head of digital payments division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has a neutral to slightly positive impact depending on the executive's reputation.

headlines.headline: Yorval Partners enters joint venture with a leading cloud platform

headlines.headline: Plevum Partners reports rising costs pressuring margins in automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Persistent cost pressures in automated logistics indicate a structural challenge that will likely weigh on earnings for the foreseeable future.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
